title: Mutazu John v Anthony Hubert Kabungo and Ors (2024/CCZ/006) [2024] ZMCC 18 (26 July 2024)
case_name: Mutazu John v Anthony Hubert Kabungo and Ors
issue_tags: Part III (Bill of Rights) jurisdiction reserved to High Court (original) and Supreme Court (appeal)
Constitutional Court lacks jurisdiction to invalidate court-martial rules under Part III
civil proceedings cannot stay criminal/court‑martial proceedings
Article 79(3) referendum requirement to amend Part III.
outcome_detail: [51] Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for want of jurisdiction
